Motivated data science learner with a strong foundation in physics (M.Sc., Jamia Millia Islamia) and over 
10 years of experience in education and analytics, currently upskilling through the AMPBA program at ISB. I 
bring a unique blend of analytical thinking, problem-solving, and hands-on technical skills—ranging from 
machine learning, LLMs, and MLOps to time series forecasting and data visualization. 
I’ve built and deployed ML models using FastAPI, Streamlit, and MLflow, developed neural net

ation. 
I’ve built and deployed ML models using FastAPI, Streamlit, and MLflow, developed neural networks and 
recommender systems, worked with LangChain & Knowledge Graphs for RAG pipelines, and applied data-
driven techniques in educational analytics. 
I’m excited by the opportunity to apply these skills in real-world settings—especially in roles that involve 
solving meaningful problems through data. I’m now seeking an internship that offers hands-on experience, 
mentorship, and room to grow

data. I’m now seeking an internship that offers hands-on experience,
